hero.subtitle: Premium real estate brokerage services and comprehensive home loan assistance for Thais abroad. All in one place.

footer.about_desc: Real estate consultant and home loan provider for Thais worldwide. Professional all-in-one service.

cta.subtitle: Start Your Journey
cta.desc: We are ready to provide free consultation, whether you are in Thailand or abroad.

services.title: CORE SERVICES BY
services.subtitle: OUR EXPERTISE
services.buy_desc: Browse beautiful properties in prime locations at great prices, whether it's a single house, townhome, or premium condo.
services.rent_desc: Looking for a temporary stay or a condo for rent in a prime location? We have various styles to meet your needs.
services.loan_desc: Consultation and home loan application services for Thais abroad and domestic. We take care of every step.

listing_grid.subtitle: LATEST LISTINGS
listing_grid.not_found: No properties found at this time.
listing_grid.sell_page_desc: Properties for sale including houses, townhomes, and premium condominiums.
listing_grid.rent_page_desc: Properties for rent in prime locations, ready to move in.

loan_section.subtitle: FINANCING SERVICES
loan_section.desc: Home loan application service for Thais working abroad. No income in Thailand needed to easily get your dream home. We take care of every step.

loan_page.desc: Empowering Thais working abroad to easily own a home in Thailand with special loan services designed specifically for you. No Thai income or co-borrower needed.
loan_page.step1_desc: Discuss details and check qualifications with our team.
loan_page.step2_desc: Our team helps advise and prepare necessary documents from abroad.
loan_page.step3_desc: We handle the entire loan application process with partner banks.
loan_page.step4_desc: Get approved and schedule ownership transfer as planned.

contact_page.subtitle: Get in touch
contact_page.desc: You can contact our staff for free consultation, whether you are in Thailand or abroad. We are ready to assist you with home loans and choosing your dream home.
contact_page.email_desc: We will reply to your message within 24 hours.
contact_page.success_desc: Our staff has received your message and will reply as soon as possible.

newsletter.desc: Subscribe for new collections and offers
